name: Branded in Red
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>赫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Target 1 "Despia" monster or "Fallen of Albaz" in your GY; add it to your hand, then you can apply the following effect.
● Fusion Summon 1 Level 8 or higher Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials mentioned on it from your hand or field, but it cannot attack directly this turn.
You can only activate 1 "Branded in Red" per turn.

sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
